title: Entergy to report third-quarter 2022 financial results on Nov. 2
text: NEW ORLEANS , Oct. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Entergy will report its third-quarter 2022 financial results before the market opens Wednesday, Nov. 2. Drew Marsh, incoming chief executive officer, Kimberly Fontan, incoming executive vice president and chief financial officer, and company leaders invite you to listen to a live webcast discussion of Entergy's financial results at 10 a.m.

title: 9 Top Utilities Stocks, A Great Place To Invest During A Recession
text: Investing in utilities shares can be a great way to limit downside risk and collect a healthy dividend in turbulent times. Here are some of the best utilities to consider investing in right now.

title: Entergy (ETR) Gets Nod for Building 250 MWac Solar Project
text: Entergy's (ETR) Driver Solar facility is going to generate enough energy to power more than 40,000 homes. This project will enhance Entergy's footprint in Northeast Arkansas.
